headline: Huey Magoo's signs 15-unit franchise deal in Texas
summary: The agreement will span five counties across the Lone Star state, a new market for the fast-casual chicken-tender chain which hopes to reach 100 units nationally before the end of the year

headline: Can Verizon's Strong Automotive Connectivity Solutions Drive Growth?
summary: VZ powers smarter, safer transport with 5G, V2X tech and automaker partnerships, driving connected, electric and autonomous vehicle innovation.
